name: Italian Eggplant Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese, freshly grated, if possible
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat 1/2 cup of olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic. Sauté until the onions are tender.
2. In a saucepan, combine the sautéed onions and garlic with the tomato sauce, dried basil, sugar, and ground pepper. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
3. Peel the eggplant and slice it into thin slices (about 1/4 inch thick).
4. In a shallow bowl, beat the egg with the milk. Place the bread crumbs in another shallow bowl.
5. Dip each eggplant slice into the egg-milk mixture, then coat with the bread crumbs.
6. Arrange the coated eggplant slices on a rack to drain excess oil.
7. Heat the remaining 1/2 cup of olive oil in the skillet over medium heat. Sauté the eggplant pieces until they are golden brown.
8. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. In an 8-inch square baking pan, spread about 1/3 of the tomato sauce.
10. Shred the mozzarella cheese and mix it with the ricotta cheese. Place a generous teaspoonful of the cheese mixture in the center of each eggplant slice. Roll up each slice seam side down and place them in the tomato sauce in the pan.
11. Pour the remaining tomato sauce over the eggplant slices, then sprinkle grated Parmesan on top.
12. Bake for 30 minutes or until heated through.
YIELD: serves 6
